_meta.author: Claude (national autopilot — social-media protocol + currency check)
_meta.note: VA-02 D challenger field (federal tier, no voting record → social-media/endorsement evidence). CURRENCY FINDING: Strickler WITHDREW Apr 2026; Osyf SUSPENDED Dec 2025; Cotter Smasal LOST VA-02 2024, 2026 run unconfirmed. Scored on documented positions + candidacy_status corrected. Frontrunner is now former Rep. Elaine Luria (separate record, has a real congressional voting record).

set.office: U.S. House VA-02 (2024 D nominee · lost to Kiggans · 2026 run unconfirmed)

profile.background: U.S. Navy veteran (Surface Warfare Officer); 2024 D nominee for VA-02, lost to Rep. Jen Kiggans 53-45; prior 2019 VA Senate run. Virginia Beach.

missy-cotter-smasal.notes_set: VA-02: 2024 Democratic nominee, LOST to Rep. Kiggans (52.95-44.54); 2026 candidacy unconfirmed as of mid-2026. [2026-06 social-media protocol] Documented progressive: pro-abortion-rights ('restore Roe'; Planned Parenthood + EMILY's List endorsed); HRC/Equality Virginia 'pro-equality' endorsed; Giffords + Everytown gun-control endorsed (Moms Demand volunteer); voting-access framing (no voter-ID support). More security-forward than typical on the border (Navy vet) and hawkish on Russia/China (VoteVets endorsed) — those left null (mixed re: the rubric). Scored on her own 2024 statements + telling single-issue endorsements.

0.note: Pro-abortion-rights ('the only pro-choice Navy veteran in the race'; 'restore Roe'); endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action + EMILY's List.
Endorsed by the Human Rights Campaign + Equality Virginia as a 'pro-equality' candidate.

1.note: Frames the issue as 'protecting voting rights' / expanding access; no photo-voter-ID support.
Endorsed by Giffords + Everytown; backs universal background checks, safe-storage mandates, red-flag laws; Moms Demand Action volunteer.

set.office: U.S. House VA-02 (2026 D candidate · WITHDREW Apr 2026)

profile.background: Former VA Secretary of Natural & Historic Resources (Northam admin) + US Interior deputy; oyster farmer. Announced VA-02 2026, withdrew April 2026 (backed frontrunner Elaine Luria).

matt-strickler.notes_set: VA-02: announced 2026 D candidate, WITHDREW April 2026 (cost of a federal race; endorsed frontrunner Elaine Luria). [2026-06 social-media protocol] Documented progressive record: signed op-ed calling to 'abolish ICE' and curtail immigration enforcement; aggressive climate/ESG record as VA Natural Resources Secretary (passed RGGI carbon cap-and-trade; forced Dominion coal-ash cleanup); ran on taxing billionaires + universal health insurance. Silent (no evidence) on life, marriage, Christian liberty, 2A — those null, not inferred. Retained as a withdrawn-candidate historical record.

2.note: Ran on taxing billionaires + universal government health insurance + more public spending (progressive-economic).

4.note: As VA Natural Resources Secretary, passed/championed RGGI carbon cap-and-trade (ESG-aligned).

0.note: Signed op-ed: 'Congress must... abolish ICE' and sharply curtail immigration enforcement.

2.note: Opposes interior immigration enforcement; would limit ICE to 'targeted operations.'

set.office: U.S. House VA-02 (2026 D candidate · SUSPENDED Dec 2025)

profile.background: Lockheed Martin policy executive; US Navy Reserve Commander; openly gay; second-generation Ukrainian-American. Announced VA-02 2026, suspended campaign Dec 9, 2025.

james-osyf.notes_set: VA-02: announced 2026 D candidate, SUSPENDED Dec 9, 2025 (to unite Democrats / pending redistricting). [2026-06 social-media protocol] Footprint was bio-heavy, policy-thin. Documented: openly gay LGBTQ national-security advocate, endorsed by the LGBTQ+ Victory Fund (which requires pro-abortion-rights of endorsees), strong defender of transgender military service. Industry-capture RED FLAG: a sitting Lockheed Martin executive who campaigned on 'revitalizing the defense industrial base' (though pledged to refuse corporate PAC money). Silent on family/Christian-liberty/2A/border — null. Retained as a suspended-candidate historical record.

0.note: Endorsed by the LGBTQ+ Victory Fund, which requires endorsees to support 'bodily autonomy' (abortion rights).
Openly gay; LGBTQ+ Victory Fund-endorsed; campaigned to unseat an 'anti-LGBTQ' incumbent.

2.note: Strong public defender of transgender military service ('any individual willing to raise their right hand... should be welcomed').

4.note: Lockheed Martin executive campaigning to 'revitalize the defense industrial base' — defense-contractor conflict (mitigated: pledged no corporate PAC money).
